## Summary

-

## Linked issue

- Closes #

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `gofmt -w $(git ls-files '*.go')`
- [ ] `cd site && npm run build` (if docs or site changed)

## Review checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and the user-facing impact is explained clearly.
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests or a concrete manual verification note.
- [ ] New dependencies are justified in the PR description.
- [ ] Network, clipboard, shell execution, or filesystem changes are called out explicitly.
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, private logs, or machine-specific data are included.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when commands, behavior, or contribution flow changed.
